title: CC narrative review S12 panel a1

payload.notes: S12 is the opening/hook panel of beat B08 (P02_b08, "The Inflation Audit · the centerpiece"), and it delivers that beat's setup faithfully. NARRATIVE-BEAT FIDELITY (5): the panel's job is the false-triumph SETUP that the rest of the centerpiece (S13 mechanism reveal → S14 invariant upgrade → S15 re-run enforcement) will dismantle — the executor reads off the celebratory '赢了 +6.2!' against the DLLM-JSON-unmasking surface while the reviewer poses the audit caution '先审评估器。'; this stages the 'did the model improve, or did the judge inflate?' question cleanly and does not leak S13's +1.4/+4.8 decomposition. The 'ORDER MATTERS' / exact_parse / json.loads context grounds why the +6.2 is suspect. COMPOSITION-STORY (4): reading order duo → score → reviewer caution → JSON/wiki surface lands the 'celebrate vs verify' pivot in one read; the half-step deduction is for the dense floating-panel / JSON-grid background that crowds the eye-path slightly, but the core beat stays legible and the cell reads distinctly from S13-S15. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story (no beat-level rejection). Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone / baked-text quality are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini + Codex).
